summary.original: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.
summary.zhCN: 画布视觉设计指南：Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. …

description.original: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 画布视觉设计指南。Agent-OPT 将官方 SKILL.md 适配为独立 Web 技能工作室：支持章节导航、全文检索、中英对照元数据与只读源码呈现；不执行上游脚本，不访问外部账号。

notes: In-process skill runtime reads only catalog/skill-bodies/<slug> files prepared at curation time.

No network, credentials, or host filesystem access is granted to the skill body.
